title: RBI Draft Amendment Directions – Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights (2026)
description: <cite index="56-4">RBI's draft Amendment Directions, released July 14, 2026, propose letting SEBI-registered mutual funds, IRDAI-registered insurers, and PFRDA-registered pension funds obtain one-time RBI approval for subsequent acquisitions of major shareholding up to 10% of paid-up capital or voting rights in a bank.</cite> Comments are due by August 4, 2026.
